Notes: Primary key. Named x_aa_exact_account_id to distinguish from x_aa_exact_contact_id (Contacts sheet). A company partner has this field populated; a person partner does not. Used for reconciliation, deduplication, and relationship resolution across all migrated tables.
Exact account code (fixed-length numeric string with leading spaces). Maps to Odoo's external reference field. Strip leading spaces during migration. Only Accounts set ref — Contacts do not.
Account name. Direct mapping. (Contacts derive name from FirstName + MiddleName + LastName instead.)
Exact search/short code. No Odoo equivalent.
Registered trade name. Odoo has no dedicated trade name field.
Exact customer status: A=None, S=Suspect, P=Prospect, C=Customer. Preserved for full fidelity. Also drives Derived customer_rank.
Preserved as custom. Also drives Derived supplier_rank.
No Odoo equivalent for reseller classification.
Whether account is allowed for sales. Odoo uses customer_rank > 0 to filter customers, but that is semantic, not a permission flag.
Excluded from marketing mailings. Odoo has is_blacklisted but semantics differ. Preserve as custom.
Pilot account flag. No Odoo equivalent.
Eligibility for extra duty. No Odoo equivalent.
Whether account data has been anonymised. Shared field name with Contacts sheet — same field on res.partner, one per record.
First address line → Odoo street. (Contacts use concatenated AddressStreet + Number + Suffix instead.)
Odoo has only street + street2. Third line preserved as custom.
Exact stores ISO country code (2-char). Resolve via res.country.code lookup.
Denormalized display field. Value derivable from country_id.name.
State/Province code. Resolve via res.country.state.code + country_id lookup.
CRM creation source for the address. No Odoo equivalent.
Odoo has no phone extension field. Shared field name with Contacts sheet.
Odoo 18 has no fax field. Shared field name with Contacts sheet.
Sales credit limit. Also set use_partner_credit_limit=True if value > 0 (see Derived).
Purchase credit limit. Odoo only has a single credit_limit (sales/receivables).
Default sales payment term code. Resolve via x_aa_code lookup on account.payment.term (Payment Terms mapping). Exact stores a code string.
Default purchase payment term code. Same resolution as PaymentConditionSales.
Default sales price list. Requires product.pricelist migration/mapping.
Sales currency code. Resolve via res.currency.name lookup.
Purchase currency code. Resolve via res.currency.name lookup.
Default sales discount (fraction, e.g., 0.055 = 5.5%). Odoo handles discounts via pricelists.
Default purchase discount (fraction). No Odoo equivalent on partner.
Default sales VAT code. Odoo uses fiscal positions instead.
Default purchase VAT code. Odoo uses fiscal positions instead.
ID of alternate account to invoice. Odoo uses child contacts with type="invoice". Preserve GUID.
Method of sending invoices (1=Paper, 2=Email, 4=Mailbox, 8=Send/track, 32=Peppol). Odoo has invoice_sending_method but value sets don't align.
Which attachment types to send with invoices. No Odoo equivalent.
Payment link active for sales. No direct Odoo partner-level equivalent.
0=combined, 1=separate invoices per subscription. No Odoo equivalent on partner.
Separate invoice per project. No Odoo equivalent on partner.
T&B consolidation scenario (0-6). No Odoo equivalent.
Display remarks on sales orders. Odoo has sale_warn but works differently.
Delivery handling (0=Partial, 1=Complete, 2=Partial without backorder). Odoo handles at picking/route level.
Default days to ship. Odoo manages on products/routes.
Default shipping method. Requires delivery carriers to be configured.
Default days to receive purchases. Odoo uses product supplierinfo.
Drop-ship capability. Odoo handles via routes.
Default GL for purchase costs. Odoo has no per-partner purchase GL offset.
Default GL for sales revenue. Odoo has no per-partner sales GL offset.
Default Accounts Payable GL. Resolve via account.account lookup.
Default Accounts Receivable GL. Resolve via account.account lookup.
Tax identification number. Odoo validates per country.
Chamber of commerce / company registration number.
Dutch Citizen Service Number. Sensitive PII.
Peppol endpoint identifier. Direct semantic match.
Peppol identifier type (numeric). Odoo has peppol_eas (selection with EAS codes). Value sets may not align.
Incoterm code for purchases. Odoo manages at order level.
Intrastat area. Odoo manages at invoice line level.
Reference to accountant (another Account). Store GUID.
Parent account (self-referential hierarchy). Resolve via x_aa_exact_account_id lookup. Ensure parent accounts migrated before children.
Main contact person GUID. After Contact migration, can be cross-referenced via x_aa_exact_contact_id on the child partner.
Reference to reseller account. Store GUID.
Activity sector → Odoo industry. Not core to subscriptions — resolve later if needed.
Sub-sector. No Odoo sub-industry. Store GUID.
Lead purpose GUID. Shared field name with Contacts sheet.
Lead source GUID. Shared field name with Contacts sheet.
Code under which your company is known at this account.
Account start date. Shared field name with Contacts sheet. Strip time.
Account end date. Used in Derived: active. Shared field name with Contacts sheet.
Date of latest external data verification.
Company logo. Odoo auto-generates smaller sizes.
Original filename. Odoo does not store filenames.
Language code. Exact ISO → Odoo locale (e.g., "NL" → "nl_NL"). Same logic as Contacts sheet.

Account remarks. Wrap in

tags. Same target as Contacts (Notes → comment).
Bank accounts collection. Deferred to later batch → res.partner.bank.
Blocked flag. May feed into Derived: active logic.
Creator. Resolve via res.users. Default to admin.
Modifier. Resolve via res.users. Default to admin.
Always True for Accounts. (Contacts sheet sets False.)
Set to 1 if Status="C", else 0. Contacts inherit from parent — do not set on person records.
Set to 1 if IsSupplier=True, else 0. Contacts inherit from parent.
False if EndDate < migration date, else True. Optionally also False if Blocked=True.
True if CreditLineSales > 0. Required for Odoo to enforce credit_limit.
Set to "contact" (default address type for company-level partners).
